entries.summary: PlanContext.updateParsedPlan — Interface for updating parsed plan

entries.detail: Updated serializeEpicNode to ensure metadata/depends_on blocks are created and serializeSection to be more robust with heading/content.
Added support for headers, lists, and checkboxes.
Fixed Map deep copy in handleDuplicateEpic.
Serializer now ensures metadata and depends_on blocks exist in the first section preamble if they were not found elsewhere.
